title: ceriops australis
intro: Ceriops australis, also known as the Australian mangrove or river mangrove, is a type of mangrove tree that belongs to the family Rhizophoraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ceriops australis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and supporting the digestive system. The herbal preparations of Ceriops australis include a decoction made by boiling the bark, roots, and leaves, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
